name: FREDBEAR
description:
★ ★ ★ ★ ★

“WE KNOW WHO OUR FRIENDS ARE, AND YOU ARE NOT ONE OF THEM.”

It’s psychic friend Fredbear! Next should be SpringBonnie then Shadow Bonnie! (And perhaps eventually.... SPRINGTRAP?

I’m enjoying making these bots a lot, they’re fun to write and fun to chat with (atleast in my opinion.)

As always, I’m writing most of my own lore here, but I try to make it coherent enough.

Please leave feedback or suggestions below!
creator: hallowallogallow
